parsed_review.summary: CP00-889 is a descriptor-only RP29 Commercial Readiness failure-recovery slice (RP29.P07.M02.S18-RP29.P07.M04.S15, 40 units, risk B). The pack-level claim is supported: the manifest honestly records production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor, status=pending_review — no runtime/enterprise-trust overclaim. Verified by Read/Grep/Glob: (1) deliverable distribution (test 3 / security_audit 4 / hermes_evidence 4 / failure_recovery 24 / implementation 3 / fixture 1 / claude_review 1 = 40) and micro-title split (3/22/15) match COMMERCIAL_CP889_REQUIRED_SECTION_ROWS, COMMERCIAL_CP889_REQUIREMENTS, manifest, and baseline exactly; (2) createFailureRecoverySectionRows emits strictly descriptor-only rows — runtime_execution/recovery_action_executed/rollback_executes_now/retry_executes_now/compensation_executed/runtime_receipt_emitted/real_client_data_included/credential_or_secret_included all false, audit_failure_hint_omits_body true, permission_denied_is_terminal_descriptor true, cross_tenant_data_exposed false; (3) validators.js (validateCommercialCp889FailureRecoverySliceCoverage/Descriptor + validateCommercialReadinessContract) enforce no-runtime/no-write/no-real-data/no-secret/no-cross-tenant plus the authority boundary (claude_is_final_approval false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust false, runtime_opening_pack_id CP00-890); (4) model.test.js asserts binding, coverage, descriptor-without-runtime, and contract currency; (5) commercial-readiness-contract.json + commercial-contract.json alias project CP00-889 as latest/current with validation.valid=true and full no_write_attestation; (6) no child_process/fs.write/fetch/network/process.env in packages/commercial/src; (7) Hermes packet emits_runtime_receipt=false (deterministic evidence-declaration only, not product runtime), Claude packet read_only=true and promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false; (8) CP178+ hardening: auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1446 bytes), and the pending-review claude-review-result placeholder (stdout_bytes 0) is correctly NOT counted as a valid receipt (exactly_one_valid_pack_level_claude_review_run=false, invalid_review_attempts empty); (9) unrelated dirty UI files (progress-control-room*) and untracked workbook/docs files are correctly excluded from pack scope. Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer and not final approver; human approval and enterprise-trust/runtime opening are deferred to a later pack. One non-blocking P3: command-evidence records only the 3 targeted commands (all exit 0); the full deterministic validation ladder and git diff --check are deferred to post-review closeout (acknowledged in the pack's own notes and not runnable under read-only review).

findings.title: Full deterministic validation ladder and git diff --check not yet recorded in command-evidence
findings.details: command-evidence.json records only three targeted commands — commercial_syntax_check_initial (node --check), commercial_model_service_tests_initial (node --test service/model), and rp29_commercial_validate_initial (npm run rp29:commercial:validate) — all exit_code 0. The full closeout ladder required by the review packet (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) is not yet recorded. The pack's own notes state the full deterministic validation ladder remains required after review normalization, adjudication update, and queue regeneration. As a read-only reviewer I cannot execute these; source inspection confirms the validator/test/contract logic is internally consistent and would be expected to pass, but the full-ladder execution evidence is still pending. This is the normal pre-commit state at review time and does not contradict the descriptor-only production_ready=false claim.
findings.recommendation: Before committing CP00-889, run and record the full deterministic validation ladder and git diff --check, confirming every command exits 0; then normalize exactly one valid Claude review receipt and update adjudication.md / construction-inspection.json from pending_review.
